name: organize-doc
description: Aggressively realign project documentation with the current codebase. Runs an orientation scan (README/AGENTS, top-level structure, key modules), then archives obsolete design docs, rewrites drifted design docs in place, safely aligns the CONTEXT.md glossary (formatting + term names; never rewrites definitions), and appends dated correction notes to drifted ADRs/incidents — all behind a preview-and-confirm plan. Never deletes docs, never rewrites immutable records or glossary definitions unprompted, never auto-commits. ACTIVATE this skill when the user wants to clean up, audit, or organize their project documentation.
custom_notes: When presenting flagged glossary issues or asking the engineer to classify or approve archiving of design docs, use the native `ask_question` tool with discrete, selectable options. For batch archive approval, list all candidates as options. Fall back to a direct conversational question if the tool is not available or the question is open-ended.
